ogTitle: San Isidore vs Sancrox: Climate Safety

heading: San Isidore vs Sancrox — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between San Isidore, New South Wales and Sancrox, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sancrox has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to San Isidore (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is San Isidore or Sancrox safer from flooding?
faq.answer: San Isidore has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Sancrox scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: San Isidore scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Sancrox scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in San Isidore or Sancrox?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sancrox has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
